One important detail is that the mountains and basins region is dry and rugged. Another detail is that the great plains include broad grasslands and high flat areas. One important detail is that grasses make food using sunlight in open fields. Another detail is that grasshoppers eat the grasses during warm months. title: Bluebonnet Field
body:
Bluebonnet Field

The hill puts on
a blue dress for April,
buttoned with bees.
Cars slow beside it,
but the flowers do not pose.
They lean into wind
and let spring take their picture.

I pause and listen.
The small scene keeps speaking
After the first sound fades.
It leaves a picture in my mind,
Bright enough to carry home,
Quiet enough to keep,
And clear enough to find again
When the day grows noisy.
topic: G4 passage seed 2026-04-30: poetry: bluebonnet field

title: Cicada Evening
body:
Cicada Evening

The cicadas tune the twilight air,
a silver buzz in every tree.
The sidewalk sweats away the glare,
and evening hums its song to me.

I pause and listen.
The small scene keeps speaking
After the first sound fades.
It leaves a picture in my mind,
Bright enough to carry home,
Quiet enough to keep,
And clear enough to find again
When the day grows noisy.

title: Grandmother's Hands
body:
Grandmother's Hands

Grandmother's hands
are two careful birds,
patting dough into circles.
Flour lifts like soft weather.
On the pan, each round moon
puffs, settles,
and waits to be shared.

I pause and listen.
The small scene keeps speaking
After the first sound fades.
It leaves a picture in my mind,
Bright enough to carry home,
Quiet enough to keep,
And clear enough to find again
When the day grows noisy.

title: Thunder Comes Walking
body:
Thunder Comes Walking

Thunder comes walking
in boots too large for the sky.
Windows tremble hello.
Rain knocks first,
then rushes in laughing
over roofs, leaves, and thirsty lawns.

I pause and listen.
The small scene keeps speaking
After the first sound fades.
It leaves a picture in my mind,
Bright enough to carry home,
Quiet enough to keep,
And clear enough to find again
When the day grows noisy.

title: Library Saturday

between library shelves.

I carry three books home,

I pause and listen.
The small scene keeps speaking

It leaves a picture in my mind,

title: West Texas Stars
body:
West Texas Stars

Night opens its black umbrella
over the desert.
Stars gather, fierce and countless,
like campfires too far to warm us.
We stand small,
but not lonely,
under all that shining distance.

I pause and listen.
The small scene keeps speaking
After the first sound fades.
It leaves a picture in my mind,
Bright enough to carry home,
Quiet enough to keep,
And clear enough to find again
When the day grows noisy.

title: Ice Cream Truck Song

title: The Lost Library Book - Scene 1
body:
THE LOST LIBRARY BOOK - SCENE 1
Scene 1

Characters:
  PRIYA - a fourth grader
  MR. CHEN - a helper in the scene
  ETHAN - another character

[The scene opens in the school library after lunch.]

PRIYA: Something is wrong, and I do not know how to fix it.

MR. CHEN: Tell us the problem one step at a time. A tangled problem is easier when we pull one thread loose.

PRIYA: Priya cannot find a book she needs to return.

ETHAN: [looking around carefully] Maybe the answer is already here. We should check what we know before we guess.

MR. CHEN: Good idea. First, what changed? Next, what stayed the same?

PRIYA: I was rushing. That made the problem feel larger than it was. I kept imagining the worst ending before I had even looked for clues.

ETHAN: Then let us slow it down. I can search this side, and you can search near the place where the trouble started.

[They work together for a moment. The room grows quieter as each person pays attention.]

MR. CHEN: Now we have a plan. Notice how the facts are beginning to line up.

PRIYA: Ethan remembers seeing it beside the reading rug. I thought I needed a miracle, but I mostly needed help.

ETHAN: And a calmer voice.

MR. CHEN: Remember this part. The best solution was not the loudest idea. It was the one supported by evidence.

[They smile as the scene ends.]
topic: G4 passage seed 2026-04-30: drama: lost library book
